steps.prompt: Words always go from left to right — first letter on the left, last letter on the right! Build bus — start on the left!
steps.feedback: b-u-s — b then u then s — left to right. Now build cat!
c first on the left, t last on the right. Now build dog!
Always left to right — just like reading. Now build cow!
c-o-w from left to right. Last one — build duck!
d-u-c-k — left to right, every time. That's how every word is written!
